publishedAbstract: * After expanding a Gluster volume, there are duplicate entries in the output of the ´ls´ command in the Gluster mountpoint: ~~~ ls-al /mnt/curr/docker/registry/v2/blobs/sha256/47/475b0168c25260112529491511ff6b29c9f72e613924e81f070aa910124cfe90 total 11 drwxrwsr-x. 2 1000000000 1000000000 4096 Jul 24 09:45. drwxrwsr-x. 13 1000000000 1000000000 4096 Jul 24 13:21..-rw-r--r--. 1 1000000000 1000000000 1299 Jul 24 09:45 data-rw-r--r--. 1 1000000000 1000000000 1299 Jul 24 09:45 data ~~~ * How to fix this issue?
publishedTitle: Why Are There Duplicate Entries in the Output of the 'ls' Command After Expanding a Gluster Volume?
